title: Seed from SWE-bench Verified
task_prompt: Given a real GitHub issue and repository checkout, produce the minimal patch that resolves the issue and passes the provided tests.
assertions: must preserve public behavior unrelated to the issue
must run or cite relevant tests
must not change tests to hide failure
license_notes: respect source repository licenses and Hugging Face dataset terms

title: prompt files: only show problems for files open in editor
task_prompt: Implement a focused VS Code behavior change from a real PR title and diff context; keep scope limited and preserve existing tests.
assertions: must derive acceptance criteria before implementation
must prefer focused diff over broad refactor
must identify validation command or explain why unavailable
license_notes: Microsoft VS Code MIT; verify current license before redistributing code
